title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Doctor with drive and ambition, Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
